    Index

    A C D E F G H I L M N P R S T 
    All Classes and Interfaces|All Packages|Constant Field Values|Serialized Form

    A

    action - Variable in record class pl.rapala.magdalena.railfence6.model.LogEntry
    The field for the action record component.
    action() - Method in record class pl.rapala.magdalena.railfence6.model.LogEntry
    Returns the value of the action record component.
    actionHistory - Variable in class pl.rapala.magdalena.railfence6.model.Model
    actionHistory - arrayList from collections package containing all the history behind each action.
    addHistory(LogEntry) - Method in class pl.rapala.magdalena.railfence6.model.Model
    addHistory is a method for updating the Model.actionHistory list with the record of a new operation.

    C

    call(String) - Method in interface pl.rapala.magdalena.railfence6.model.ExceptionLambda
    call method returns and throws an exception instance of type V with the message.
    cId - Variable in class pl.rapala.magdalena.railfence6.model.CipherParams
    cId is the CipherParams record id.
    cipherParams - Variable in class pl.rapala.magdalena.railfence6.model.ResultHistory
    cipherParams is a mapping to the appropriate cipherParams record (one-to-one).
    CipherParams - Class in pl.rapala.magdalena.railfence6.model
    CipherParams is a database entity which stores the basic cipher parameters except for the result.
    CipherParams() - Constructor for class pl.rapala.magdalena.railfence6.model.CipherParams
     
    contextDestroyed(ServletContextEvent) - Method in class pl.rapala.magdalena.railfence6.model.ModelContextListener
    contextDestroyed is a method that gets called when the application life cycle is ending.
    contextInitialized(ServletContextEvent) - Method in class pl.rapala.magdalena.railfence6.model.ModelContextListener
    contextInitialized is a class method that initialises the context for the entire application lifecycle.
    ControllerServlet - Class in pl.rapala.magdalena.railfence6.controller
    ControllerServlet is a class that extends the HttpServlet and acts as a Controller for the RailFence application.
    ControllerServlet() - Constructor for class pl.rapala.magdalena.railfence6.controller.ControllerServlet
    Constructor initiating statistics collection.

    D

    decode() - Method in class pl.rapala.magdalena.railfence6.model.Model
    Method decoding the text according to the number of rails.
    doGet(HttpServletRequest, HttpServletResponse) - Method in class pl.rapala.magdalena.railfence6.controller.ControllerServlet
    Handles the HTTP GET method.
    doGet(HttpServletRequest, HttpServletResponse) - Method in class pl.rapala.magdalena.railfence6.controller.HistoryServlet
    Handles the HTTP GET method.
    doPost(HttpServletRequest, HttpServletResponse) - Method in class pl.rapala.magdalena.railfence6.controller.ControllerServlet
    Handles the HTTP POST method.
    doPost(HttpServletRequest, HttpServletResponse) - Method in class pl.rapala.magdalena.railfence6.controller.HistoryServlet
    Handles the HTTP POST method.

    E

    em - Variable in class pl.rapala.magdalena.railfence6.model.ModelContextListener
    em is the instance of the EntityManager which will be used by the entire application.
    emf - Variable in class pl.rapala.magdalena.railfence6.model.ModelContextListener
    emf is the instance of EntityManagerFactory which will be used by the entire application.
    encode() - Method in class pl.rapala.magdalena.railfence6.model.Model
    Method encoding the text according to the number of rails.
    equals(Object) - Method in class pl.rapala.magdalena.railfence6.model.CipherParams
    equals is an overriden method which checks whether two objects are equal based on their id.
    equals(Object) - Method in record class pl.rapala.magdalena.railfence6.model.LogEntry
    Indicates whether some other object is "equal to" this one.
    equals(Object) - Method in class pl.rapala.magdalena.railfence6.model.ResultHistory
    equals is an overriden method which checks whether two objects are equal based on their id.
    ExceptionLambda<V,E> - Interface in pl.rapala.magdalena.railfence6.model
    ExceptionLambda is a functional interface (has one method) used for creation of lambdas; It allows to throw any exceptions that extend Exception.

    F

    findCipherObjects(String, String, int) - Method in class pl.rapala.magdalena.railfence6.controller.ControllerServlet
    findCipherObjects is a method which by given parameters searches the database and returns the object with equal parameters.
    findHistoryObjects() - Method in class pl.rapala.magdalena.railfence6.controller.HistoryServlet
    findHistoryObjects is a method which accesses the database and returns a list of all ResultHistory objects.
    findLinkedCParams(ResultHistory) - Method in class pl.rapala.magdalena.railfence6.controller.HistoryServlet
    findLinkedCParams is a method which accesses the database and returns the list (one) CipherParams linked to the param resultHistory.
    findLinkedHResult(CipherParams) - Method in class pl.rapala.magdalena.railfence6.controller.ControllerServlet
    findLinkedHResult is a method that takes the CipherParams object and returns a list (one) of ResultHistory linked to that object.

    G

    getCipherParams() - Method in class pl.rapala.magdalena.railfence6.model.ResultHistory
    Get the value of cipherParams
    getId() - Method in class pl.rapala.magdalena.railfence6.model.CipherParams
    getId is a getter method which returns the id of the record.
    getId() - Method in class pl.rapala.magdalena.railfence6.model.ResultHistory
    getId is a getter method which returns the id of the record.
    getModeSelect() - Method in class pl.rapala.magdalena.railfence6.model.CipherParams
    Get the value of modeSelect
    getNoOfRails() - Method in class pl.rapala.magdalena.railfence6.model.CipherParams
    Get the value of noOfRails
    getResult() - Method in class pl.rapala.magdalena.railfence6.model.ResultHistory
    Get the value of result
    getResultHistory() - Method in class pl.rapala.magdalena.railfence6.model.CipherParams
    Get the value of resultHistory
    getServletInfo() - Method in class pl.rapala.magdalena.railfence6.controller.ControllerServlet
    Returns a short description of the servlet.
    getServletInfo() - Method in class pl.rapala.magdalena.railfence6.controller.HistoryServlet
    Returns a short description of the servlet.
    getTextCipher() - Method in class pl.rapala.magdalena.railfence6.model.CipherParams
    Get the value of textCipher

    H

    hashCode() - Method in class pl.rapala.magdalena.railfence6.model.CipherParams
    hashCode is a method which returns the hashed id.
    hashCode() - Method in record class pl.rapala.magdalena.railfence6.model.LogEntry
    Returns a hash code value for this object.
    hashCode() - Method in class pl.rapala.magdalena.railfence6.model.ResultHistory
    hashCode is an overriden method which returns the hashed id.
    history - Variable in class pl.rapala.magdalena.railfence6.controller.HistoryServlet
    history - a list of LogEntry class records containing the history of all cipher operations.
    HistoryServlet - Class in pl.rapala.magdalena.railfence6.controller
    HistoryServlet is a HttpServlet class handling the cipher operation history.
    HistoryServlet() - Constructor for class pl.rapala.magdalena.railfence6.controller.HistoryServlet
    Empty HistoryServlet constructor.

    I

    IncorrectNoOfRailsException - Exception Class in pl.rapala.magdalena.railfence6.model
    A derived exception class for errors relating to the number of rails.
    IncorrectNoOfRailsException() - Constructor for exception class pl.rapala.magdalena.railfence6.model.IncorrectNoOfRailsException
    Initiates a IncorrectNoOfRailsException object.
    IncorrectNoOfRailsException(String) - Constructor for exception class pl.rapala.magdalena.railfence6.model.IncorrectNoOfRailsException
    Initiates a IncorrectNoOfRailsException object.
    inputText - Variable in record class pl.rapala.magdalena.railfence6.model.LogEntry
    The field for the inputText record component.
    inputText() - Method in record class pl.rapala.magdalena.railfence6.model.LogEntry
    Returns the value of the inputText record component.

    L

    LogEntry - Record Class in pl.rapala.magdalena.railfence6.model
    LogEntry record is a record that will hold all history.
    LogEntry(String, String, int, String, String) - Constructor for record class pl.rapala.magdalena.railfence6.model.LogEntry
    Creates an instance of a LogEntry record class.

    M

    mode - Variable in record class pl.rapala.magdalena.railfence6.model.LogEntry
    The field for the mode record component.
    mode() - Method in record class pl.rapala.magdalena.railfence6.model.LogEntry
    Returns the value of the mode record component.
    model - Variable in class pl.rapala.magdalena.railfence6.controller.ControllerServlet
    model - an instance of Model class, conducts the Rail Fence cipher.
    model - Variable in class pl.rapala.magdalena.railfence6.controller.HistoryServlet
    model - an instance of Model class, allows for the access of actionHistory list.
    model - Variable in class pl.rapala.magdalena.railfence6.model.ModelContextListener
    model instance to be used by the entire application.
    Model - Class in pl.rapala.magdalena.railfence6.model
    A class that realizes the Rail Fence cipher, This class contains many methods and uses @Getter from Lombok.
    Model() - Constructor for class pl.rapala.magdalena.railfence6.model.Model
    Initiates a Model object and assigns a View class to it.
    ModelContextListener - Class in pl.rapala.magdalena.railfence6.model
    Web application lifecycle listener.
    ModelContextListener() - Constructor for class pl.rapala.magdalena.railfence6.model.ModelContextListener
    ModelContextListener empty constructor.
    modeSelect - Variable in class pl.rapala.magdalena.railfence6.model.CipherParams
    modeSelect - either en - encoding or de - decoding.
    modeSelect - Variable in class pl.rapala.magdalena.railfence6.model.Model
    modeSelect - either en - encoding or de - decoding.

    N

    noOfRails - Variable in class pl.rapala.magdalena.railfence6.model.CipherParams
    the number of rails needed for the cipher.
    noOfRails - Variable in class pl.rapala.magdalena.railfence6.model.Model
    the number of rails needed for the cipher.

    P

    persistObject(Object) - Method in class pl.rapala.magdalena.railfence6.controller.ControllerServlet
    persistObject is a method which takes the object and saves it into the database.
    pl.rapala.magdalena.railfence6.controller - package pl.rapala.magdalena.railfence6.controller
    Contains ControllerServlet and HistoryServlet HttpServlet classes.
    pl.rapala.magdalena.railfence6.model - package pl.rapala.magdalena.railfence6.model
    Contains Model class, IncorrectNoOfRailsException exception class, LogEntry record, ExceptionLambda functional interface, ModelContextListener implementing the ServletContextListener interface, and CipherParams, ResultHistory database models.
    processRequest(HttpServletRequest, HttpServletResponse) - Method in class pl.rapala.magdalena.railfence6.controller.ControllerServlet
    Processes requests for both HTTP GET and POST methods.
    processRequest(HttpServletRequest, HttpServletResponse) - Method in class pl.rapala.magdalena.railfence6.controller.HistoryServlet
    Processes requests for both HTTP GET and POST methods.

    R

    railFence() - Method in class pl.rapala.magdalena.railfence6.model.Model
    Method managing the Rail Fence cipher according to the mode.
    rails - Variable in record class pl.rapala.magdalena.railfence6.model.LogEntry
    The field for the rails record component.
    rails() - Method in record class pl.rapala.magdalena.railfence6.model.LogEntry
    Returns the value of the rails record component.
    readFromCookies - Variable in class pl.rapala.magdalena.railfence6.controller.ControllerServlet
    readFromCookies - a Boolean value regarding the initialization of ControllerServlet.stats being read from cookies.
    result - Variable in class pl.rapala.magdalena.railfence6.controller.ControllerServlet
    result - the end result of the conducted cipher.
    result - Variable in record class pl.rapala.magdalena.railfence6.model.LogEntry
    The field for the result record component.
    result - Variable in class pl.rapala.magdalena.railfence6.model.ResultHistory
    result is the result of the cipher operation, either Encryption or Decryption.
    result() - Method in record class pl.rapala.magdalena.railfence6.model.LogEntry
    Returns the value of the result record component.
    resultHistory - Variable in class pl.rapala.magdalena.railfence6.model.CipherParams
    resultHistory is a mapping to the appropriate ResultHistory record (one-to-one).
    ResultHistory - Class in pl.rapala.magdalena.railfence6.model
    ResultHistory is a database unit class which stores the results of the cipher.
    ResultHistory() - Constructor for class pl.rapala.magdalena.railfence6.model.ResultHistory
     
    rId - Variable in class pl.rapala.magdalena.railfence6.model.ResultHistory
    rId is the ResultHistory record id.

    S

    serialVersionUID - Static variable in class pl.rapala.magdalena.railfence6.model.CipherParams
    serialVersionUID is a value required by the Serializable interface, checks compatible versions, conventionally 1L.
    serialVersionUID - Static variable in class pl.rapala.magdalena.railfence6.model.ResultHistory
    serialVersionUID is a value required by the Serializable interface, checks compatible versions, conventionally 1L.
    setCipherParams(CipherParams) - Method in class pl.rapala.magdalena.railfence6.model.ResultHistory
    Set the value of cipherParams
    setId(Long) - Method in class pl.rapala.magdalena.railfence6.model.CipherParams
    setId is a method which sets the cId (id) for the CipherParams unit.
    setId(Long) - Method in class pl.rapala.magdalena.railfence6.model.ResultHistory
    setId is a method which sets the rId (id) for the CipherParams unit.
    setMode(String) - Method in class pl.rapala.magdalena.railfence6.model.Model
    Method setting the mode needed for the cipher and checking the validity.
    setModeSelect(String) - Method in class pl.rapala.magdalena.railfence6.model.CipherParams
    Set the value of modeSelect
    setNoOfRails(int) - Method in class pl.rapala.magdalena.railfence6.model.CipherParams
    Set the value of noOfRails
    setNoOfRails(int) - Method in class pl.rapala.magdalena.railfence6.model.Model
    Method setting the number of rails for the Rail Fence cipher, checking for its validity.
    setResult(String) - Method in class pl.rapala.magdalena.railfence6.model.ResultHistory
    Set the value of result
    setResultHistory(ResultHistory) - Method in class pl.rapala.magdalena.railfence6.model.CipherParams
    Set the value of resultHistory
    setText(String) - Method in class pl.rapala.magdalena.railfence6.model.Model
    Method setting the text for the cipher.
    setTextCipher(String) - Method in class pl.rapala.magdalena.railfence6.model.CipherParams
    Set the value of textCipher
    stats - Variable in class pl.rapala.magdalena.railfence6.controller.ControllerServlet
    stats - is HashMap being used to count the events happening in the ControllerServlet.

    T

    textCipher - Variable in class pl.rapala.magdalena.railfence6.model.CipherParams
    textCipher - the text to either encode or decode.
    textCipher - Variable in class pl.rapala.magdalena.railfence6.model.Model
    textCipher - the text to either encode or decode.
    toString() - Method in class pl.rapala.magdalena.railfence6.model.CipherParams
    toString is a method which returns the id to the record as a String value.
    toString() - Method in record class pl.rapala.magdalena.railfence6.model.LogEntry
    Returns a string representation of this record class.
    toString() - Method in class pl.rapala.magdalena.railfence6.model.ResultHistory
    toString is a method which returns the id to the record as a String value.
